_comment: Source of truth for per-program social share cards (the image + caption shown in iMessage/MMS, Facebook, LinkedIn). 'image' is Justin's designed 1200x630 card under /og/. 'title' is the bold caption iMessage shows beneath the image; 'subhead' is the og:description other platforms show. Used by scripts/og-stamp.mjs to bake the tags into dist/<route>/index.html. Add a route here the moment its card image exists.
